title: hypericum patulum var. oblongifolium
intro: Hypericum patulum var. oblongifolium, also known as St John's wort, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Hypericaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat mild depression, anxiety, and skin conditions such as wounds and burns, due to its high concentration of hyperforin and hypericin. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The herbal preparations of Hypericum patulum var. oblongifolium include teas, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various conditions.
